modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to verify caller identity using Duo Push.

full_description_text: The help desk analyst was on a call trying to confirm the identity of a customer. They needed to use Duo Push for verification but were unsure how to do it. The analyst also wanted to prove their affiliation with the University during the call.
short_description: Unable to verify caller identity using Duo Push.
description: The help desk analyst was on a call trying to confirm the identity of a customer. They needed to use Duo Push for verification but were unsure how to do it. The analyst also wanted to prove their affiliation with the University during the call.
